text.title: Internal Linking Graph Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to crawl, audit, fix, and re-verify an internal-link graph.

step.name: crawl-site
step.action: Crawl all indexable pages. Export URL + inbound count + outbound count + anchor-text per link.

step.name: assign-clusters
step.action: Assign each URL to one cluster. Mark hub candidates. Clusters with <4 spokes merge or absorb.
step.decision-gate: Cluster has <4 spokes after merge → drop the cluster. Rule r2.

step.name: confirm-one-hub-per-cluster
step.action: Pick one hub per cluster. Re-route other hub candidates to spoke status. Document hub choice rationale.
step.decision-gate: Two hubs candidate → block, force pick. Rule r1.

step.name: audit-link-violations
step.action: Compute: orphans (no inbound from cluster), low_inbound_spokes (<2 inbound), exact_match_anchor_targets (anchor_form_count <3), missing_hub_link_spokes (no in-body link to hub). Emit audit.

step.name: emit-fix-diffs
step.action: For each audit row, emit a fix: add-link / change-anchor / fold-into-cluster / de-index. Group by page to minimise edit passes.

step.name: re-crawl-and-verify
step.action: Re-crawl. Re-run audit. Confirm all 4 audit lists empty. Persist crawl_date.
step.decision-gate: Audit lists not all empty after fixes → loop to step 5.
